final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial illustration of a ginger cat's daily life in a healing, cozy style.

Style/medium: healing kawaii illustration, soft painterly texture with visible brushwork, Studio Ghibli-inspired warmth
Composition: medium shot from slightly above, 50mm equivalent perspective, cat as focal point in lower third
Subject: chubby orange tabby cat with fluffy fur, eyes half-closed in contentment, paws tucked, tail curled around body
Scene/backdrop: wooden windowsill with potted plant, snow falling outside on quiet winter street, bare tree branches visible
Lighting/mood: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through window, creating soft glow on fur, contrast with cool blue winter light outside
Color palette: warm amber and cream tones inside as base, soft orange fur as anchor, cool pale blue and white snow as counterpoint
Materials/textures: soft fluffy fur with individual strands catching light, smooth wooden windowsill grain, powdery snow texture
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, watermark, 8K stuffer text
